title: OS Compatibility Testing - macOS 14 (Sonoma)
body: Testing Details Testing is being conducted using macOS 14.0 on a 2020 13-inch M1 MacBook Pro. Recommendation macOS 14 is currently supported on Departmental Support-managed systems per DoIT Support's supported OS policy . See Apple Silicon-specific compatibility here . Software Version Tested Vendor Support Information DoIT Upgrade Test Result DoIT New Install Test Result DoIT Testing Notes Active Directory N/A Domain join to CADS and login using NetID were both successful on new macOS 14.0 instances. Maintains domain connection when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Adobe Creative Cloud 6.0.0.571 Adobe Creative Cloud system requirements Installs successfully on new macOS 14.0 instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Adobe Creative Cloud desktop application starts at login. Successfully installs new Adobe CC applications. Box Drive 2.33.130 Understand the Box Policy For Browser And OS Support Product Announcements - Box Support Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from the previous macOS version to 13.0. Box-folder syncs successfully. Shared Box folders syncs successfully. Successfully add, edit, and remove files from the Box folder. BigFix (Security) 10.0.9.21 BigFix Platform Release Information Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Launches Self Service Application successfully. Reports into BigFix console, receives deployments, and reports back to relevance inquiries successfully. The Offers dashboard appears correctly and allows for the acceptance and deployment of offer content. Cisco Secure Endpoint (Security) 1.22.2.916 Verify Secure Endpoint Mac Connector OS Compatibility Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Reports data to the management console. Scans complete successfully. EICAR test file is detected immediately and deleted upon download. Cisco Jabber 14.1.2 Officially supported in 14.2 Cisco Jabber for Mac Release Notes Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Searching for contacts working as expected. Successfully make and receive calls. Successfully review voicemail messages. DisplayLink Manager 1.10 Officially supported in 1.9 DisplayLink macOS Software Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected Google Drive 81.0.5.0 System requirements and browsers - Computer - Google Drive Help Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Successfully add, edit, and remove files from the Google Drive folder. Offline files work as expected. Microsoft Teams 1.6.00.24065 Hardware requirements for Teams on a Mac Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Successfully sends and receives messages to and from individuals, groups, and teams. Successfully performs calls and video conferencing via the built-in solutions. Successfully creates new teams and modifies existing teams. Searching for contacts working as expected. Note : Testing was performed on the current update channel version of Teams. A campus IT partner participating in the Teams public preview has noted issues with microphone mute and camera control in that early access/preview channel version of Teams under Sonoma. Microsoft 365 16.77.1 Microsoft 365 and Office Resources Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Excel, PowerPoint, and Word Adds M365 account to Excel, PowerPoint, and Word successfully. Successfully creates, edits, and opens documents in Excel, PowerPoint, and Word. Outlook M365 account syncs to Outlook successfully. Sends and receives emails as expected. Reflects email folder and read status on account as expected. Calendar events, details, and invitees appear successfully. Able to create new calendar events, invite attendees, check invitees' availability, add notes. Palo Alto GlobalProtect 5.2.13-48 Officially supported in 6.0.7/6.1.2 Where Can I Install the Global Protect App? Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Connects successfully with dynamic pool. Connects successfully with static IP. Qualys Cloud Agent (Security) 3.7.0-54 Cloud Agent Platform Availability Matrix (PAM) Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Reports data to the management console. Spirion (Security) 12.5.0.0 Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Reports data to the management console. VMware Workspace ONE Intelligent Hub 23.01.0 VMware Workspace ONE Intelligent Hub for macOS Release Notes Introduction to Managing macOS Devices Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Reports data to the management console. Executes commands issued from the console. Webex 43.7.0.26612 System requirements for Webex services Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Successfully joins video conferencing meetings. Outlook calendar items visible within Webex. Searching for contacts working as expected. Successfully make and receive calls. Successfully review voicemail messages. Zoom 5.16.0 Zoom system requirements: Windows, macOS, Linux Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 13 to 14.0. Able to create meetings, join existing meetings, video and audio working. Virtual backgrounds working.
